title: VETERAN SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: FORT KENNEDY VETERAN SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Alcoholics Anonymous (AA) meetings and post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) classes. 7600 SE Johnson Creek Boulevard Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Veterans; all discharge types Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 765-2661 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 765-2661 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website calendar for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: VA ID or DD-214 AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 72, stop is 82nd Avenue and Johnson Creek Boulevard Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Support Groups * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Veteran Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - FORT KENNEDY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FORT KENNEDY
